nameMeanings.name: d'Amboise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Jeannot, Laurent, Marcel, Michel, Pascal.
French (also D'Amboise): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Amboise in Indre-et-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Huguette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Huguette d'Amboise was born about 1090, in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugues, I d'Amboise, was 17 and her mother, Sybille de Châtellerault, was 17. She had at least 8 sons and 8 daughters with Guillaume d'Harcourt. She died about 1153, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Huguette d'Amboise(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 셰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues, I d'Amboise(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybille de Châtellerault(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume d'Harcourt(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Huguette d'Amboise родилась около 1090 г. в местности шентон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugues, I d'Amboise было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybille de Châtellerault, 17.
